text: The Transformer architecture was introduced by Vaswani et al. from Google Brain / Google Research in the 2017 paper 'Attention Is All You Need'
As of May 2026, the paper has been cited over 140,000 times, making it one of the most cited papers in AI history
The base Transformer model achieved 28.4 BLEU on the WMT 2014 English-to-German translation task, setting a new state-of-the-art at the time of publication
